heading: Excise tax on undistributed income of real estate investment trusts
label: 4981 Excise tax on undistributed income of real estate investment trusts
notes: References in TextSubsection (b)(3)(A) of section 857, referred to in subsec. (c)(1)(B), was repealed and subsection (b)(3)(B) was redesignated (b)(3)(A) by , , .Pub. L. 115–97, title I, § 13001(b)(2)(K)(i)131 Stat. 2096Dec. 22, 2017

Amendments1988—Subsec. (c)(1)(A). , inserted “(but computed without regard to that portion of such deduction which is attributable to the amount excluded under section 857(b)(2)(D)” after “such calendar year”.Pub. L. 100–647, § 1006(s)(3)Subsec. (e)(2). , amended par. (2) generally, designating existing provisions as subpar. (A) and adding subpars. (B) and (C).Pub. L. 100–647, § 1006(s)(1)1986— substituted “Excise tax on undistributed income of real estate investment trusts” for “Excise tax based on certain real estate investment trust taxable income not distributed during the taxable year” as section catchline and amended text generally. Prior to amendment text read as follows: “Effective with respect to taxable years beginning after , there is hereby imposed on each real estate investment trust for the taxable year a tax equal to 3 percent of the amount (if any) by which 75 percent of the real estate investment trust taxable income (as defined in section 857(b)(2), but determined without regard to section 857(b)(2)(B), and by excluding any net capital gain for the taxable year) exceeds the amount of the dividends paid deduction (as defined in section 561, but computed without regard to capital gains dividends as defined in section 857(b)(3)(C) and without regard to any dividend paid after the close of the taxable year) for the taxable year. For purposes of the preceding sentence, the determination of the real estate investment trust taxable income shall be made by taking into account only the amount and character of the items of income and deduction as reported by such trust in its return for the taxable year.”Pub. L. 99–514December 31, 1979

children.heading: Determination of dividends paid
children.label: 3 Determination of dividends paid
children.text: The amount of the dividends paid during any calendar year shall be determined without regard to the provisions of section 858.

children.heading: Time for payment of tax
children.label: d Time for payment of tax
children.text: The tax imposed by this section for any calendar year shall be paid on or before March 15 of the following calendar year.

children.label: A
children.text: without regard to subparagraph (B) of section 857(b)(2),

children.label: B
children.text: by not taking into account any gain or loss from the sale or exchange of a capital asset, and

children.label: C
children.text: by treating the calendar year as the trust’s taxable year.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “capital gain net income” has the meaning given such term by section 1222(9) (determined by treating the calendar year as the trust’s taxable year).

children.heading: Reduction for net ordinary loss
children.label: B Reduction for net ordinary loss
children.text: The amount determined under subparagraph (A) shall be reduced by the amount of the trust’s net ordinary loss for the taxable year.

children.heading: Net ordinary loss
children.label: C Net ordinary loss
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the net ordinary loss for the calendar year is the amount which would be net operating loss of the trust for the calendar year if the amount of such loss were determined in the same manner as ordinary income is determined under paragraph (1).

children.label: A
children.text: such dividend shall be taken into account when paid without regard to section 860, and

children.label: B
children.text: any income giving rise to the adjustment shall be treated as arising when the dividend is paid.
